requirement_topic.en: Customs Clearance — DGDDI / ECOWAS CET / ARTCI Certificate
requirement_topic.zh: 海关清关——DGDDI / ECOWAS共同对外关税 / ARTCI证书
requirement_topic.zht: 海關清關——DGDDI / ECOWAS共同對外關稅 / ARTCI證書

summary.en: Import of radio and telecommunications terminal equipment into Ivory Coast is administered by DGDDI (Direction Générale des Douanes et Droits Indirects). Customs duties are levied under the ECOWAS Common External Tariff (CET), which classifies telecommunications equipment under HS Chapter 85. A valid ARTCI homologation certificate must be presented to DGDDI at customs clearance for radio and telecom terminal equipment. Value-added tax (TVA) applies at the standard Ivorian rate. The importer of record must be a locally registered Ivorian entity. All customs documentation (invoices, packing lists, certificates of origin) must be in French or accompanied by certified French translations.
summary.zh: 无线电及电信终端设备进口科特迪瓦由DGDDI（直接税与间接税总局）负责管理。关税依据ECOWAS共同对外关税（CET）征收，电信设备归入HS第85章。无线电及电信终端设备在DGDDI清关时须提交有效的ARTCI同质化证书。按科特迪瓦标准税率征收增值税（TVA）。进口商记录须为在当地注册的科特迪瓦实体。所有海关文件（发票、装箱单、原产地证书）须以法语出具，或附经认证的法语译文。
summary.zht: 無線電及電信終端設備進口科特迪瓦由DGDDI（直接稅與間接稅總局）負責管理。關稅依據ECOWAS共同對外關稅（CET）徵收，電信設備歸入HS第85章。無線電及電信終端設備在DGDDI清關時須提交有效的ARTCI同質化證書。按科特迪瓦標準稅率徵收增值稅（TVA）。進口商記錄須為在當地註冊的科特迪瓦實體。所有海關文件（發票、裝箱單、原產地證書）須以法語出具，或附經認證的法語譯文。

standards_or_laws: ECOWAS Common External Tariff (CET) — HS Chapter 85 (telecommunications equipment)
Loi n°2012-293 du 23 mars 2012 relative aux télécommunications (ARTCI certificate at customs)
TVA (taxe sur la valeur ajoutée) — standard Ivorian rate

summary.en: China uses its own HS-based tariff schedule (MFN rates) under GACC (General Administration of Customs of China) for import/export. Chinese export documentation is typically in Chinese and English. There is no ARTCI certificate requirement in Chinese export customs. ECOWAS CET does not apply to China-side customs.
summary.zh: 中国依据中国海关总署（GACC）的本国HS税则（最惠国税率）办理进出口业务。中国出口文件通常以中英文出具。中国出口海关无ARTCI证书要求。ECOWAS共同对外关税不适用于中国方面的海关事务。
summary.zht: 中國依據中國海關總署（GACC）的本國HS稅則（最惠國稅率）辦理進出口業務。中國出口文件通常以中英文出具。中國出口海關無ARTCI證書要求。ECOWAS共同對外關稅不適用於中國方面的海關事務。

gap.en: Full gap: Chinese export customs procedures do not include ARTCI certificate requirements or ECOWAS CET obligations. For Ivory Coast import: (1) a valid ARTCI homologation certificate must accompany the shipment; (2) ECOWAS CET duties under HS Chapter 85 apply; (3) all customs documentation must be in French or with certified French translations; (4) TVA applies at the Ivorian rate; (5) the importer of record must be a locally registered Ivorian entity.
gap.zh: 完全差距：中国出口海关程序不包含ARTCI证书要求或ECOWAS共同对外关税义务。科特迪瓦进口方面：（1）货物须附有效ARTCI同质化证书；（2）依据HS第85章适用ECOWAS共同对外关税；（3）所有海关文件须以法语出具或附经认证的法语译文；（4）按科特迪瓦税率征收增值税；（5）进口商记录须为在当地注册的科特迪瓦实体。
gap.zht: 完全差距：中國出口海關程序不包含ARTCI證書要求或ECOWAS共同對外關稅義務。科特迪瓦進口方面：（1）貨物須附有效ARTCI同質化證書；（2）依據HS第85章適用ECOWAS共同對外關稅；（3）所有海關文件須以法語出具或附經認證的法語譯文；（4）按科特迪瓦稅率徵收增值稅；（5）進口商記錄須為在當地註冊的科特迪瓦實體。

source.publisher: DGDDI — Direction Générale des Douanes et Droits Indirects (Côte d'Ivoire)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ivory Coast customs clearance for radio/telecom terminal equipment requires a valid ARTCI homologation certificate, ECOWAS CET duty payment under HS Chapter 85, French-language documentation, TVA at the Ivorian rate, and a locally registered Ivorian importer of record. Chinese export procedures do not fulfil these Ivorian import obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 无线电/电信终端设备科特迪瓦海关清关须提交有效ARTCI同质化证书、依据HS第85章缴纳ECOWAS共同对外关税、提供法语文件、按科特迪瓦税率缴纳增值税，并须有在当地注册的科特迪瓦进口商记录。中国出口程序不满足上述科特迪瓦进口义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 無線電/電信終端設備科特迪瓦海關清關須提交有效ARTCI同質化證書、依據HS第85章繳納ECOWAS共同對外關稅、提供法語文件、按科特迪瓦稅率繳納增值稅，並須有在當地註冊的科特迪瓦進口商記錄。中國出口程序不滿足上述科特迪瓦進口義務。
